howItWorks.intro: This window replacement cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Per Window = Material Cost x Frame Multiplier + Labor
Payback Period = Total Cost / Annual Energy Savings
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How much do replacement windows cost?
faq.answer: Average cost is $400-700 per window for double-pane vinyl (installed). Budget $300-400 for single pane, $600-1,100 for triple pane, and $700-1,500 for impact-resistant. A whole-house project (10-15 windows) typically runs $5,000-15,000.

faq.question: Are energy-efficient windows worth the cost?
faq.answer: Double-pane Low-E windows can reduce energy bills by 10-15%. Triple-pane saves 15-25%. The payback period is typically 10-20 years from energy savings alone, but they also improve comfort and resale value.
